name: Pollo Loco Marinade
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine all ingredients in a bowl.
2. Place chicken in a resealable plastic bag or container and pour the marinade over the chicken, ensuring it is well-coated.
3. Refrigerate for 4-24 hours.
4. Preheat grill to medium-high heat.
5. Grill chicken for 20 minutes on each side.
6. Serve with flour tortillas and fresh salsa.
